name: Concealment
description: Mask your scent from creatures, hide, sneak, and execute sneak attacks for bonus damage regardless of weapon type.

nodes.name: Basic Stealth
nodes.description: Crouch to enter stealth. Move slower but reduce creature aggro range.

nodes.name: Advanced Scent Masking
nodes.description: Further reduces detection radius. Creatures must be very close to spot you.

nodes.name: Sneak Attack
nodes.description: Attacks from stealth deal bonus damage with any weapon type.

special.name: Ambush Strike
special.description: First attack from stealth deals 2x damage and briefly stuns the target.

nodes.name: Group Camouflage
nodes.description: Extend your stealth field to nearby party members for a short duration.
